metadata.title: Aman Agarwal — Professional Summary
metadata.text: Aman Agarwal — Senior Frontend Developer. Senior Frontend Developer with proven expertise in scaling React applications to 10M+ users. Specialized in performance optimization (40% improvement), micro-frontend architecture, and developer tooling. Track record of delivering mission-critical features at Paytm while maintaining exceptional user experience.

metadata.title: Senior Software Developer at Godaddy
metadata.text:
Senior Software Developer at Godaddy (2025-07 to present).
Working on commerce home experience team to develop full stack application. Debugged and fixed scaling issue impacting 100k transitions per day.

metadata.title: Senior Software Developer at Paytm
metadata.text:
Senior Software Developer at Paytm (2022-09 to 2025-07).
UPI: Tech owner of UPI onboarding, UPI Mapper, and Manage UPI IDs pages used by 10+ million users daily. Enhanced user experience by developing pixel-perfect UI with smooth transitions and performance-oriented pages, ensuring end-to-end integration test coverage. Improved developer experience by implementing solutions like a VS-Code plugin and TypeScript generics, reducing overall development time by 10%.

metadata.title: Software Engineer at Raja Software Labs
metadata.text:
Software Engineer at Raja Software Labs (2021-01 to 2022-08).
Contributed in Optum's prescription platform with telemedicine integration for 100K+ patients. Built real-time appointment scheduling system handling 1K+ daily bookings. Revamped LinkedIn's analytics dashboard UI, enhancing data visibility.

metadata.title: Technical Speaking
metadata.text:
Technical speaking engagements:
Micro-frontend architecture using module federation: Presented on how to build scalable micro-frontend systems using Webpack Module Federation.
How browser renders animations: Presented on browser rendering pipeline, compositing layers, and achieving smooth 60fps animations.
